chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1492 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6304/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6305/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 26-09-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. On 12.10.2023, Counsel for the Petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this Petition. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this Petition diligently. From perusal of prayer clause, it reflects that the Petitioner is seeking his appointment on the basis of donation of plot for installation of Water supply scheme in the village, whereas, the said Policy has been set aside by the Honourable Supreme Court. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
